title: [WIP] Still remove image even if getting parent fails

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
Are you sure reading the *parent* is the problem? I don't get that out of the BZ you linked. To me, it looks like the image he's trying to *remove* is missing a manifest, so we can't read it.
I am guessing.  I was thinking that that function was failing before the image was attempted to be deleted.

```
 podman image prune -a

Error:failed to prune image: error reading image 

"cc7639456e4a4c922cb086cf35f297427b3e8c38c14716533f67c66d70dd052a" as image: error locating item named "manifest" for image with ID "cc7639456e4a4c922cb086cf35f297427b3e8c38c14716533f67c66d70dd052a": file does not exist
```
I got got up in the error line above "error reading image", I did not see where removing the image would attempt to read, but the GetParent above might.

We need to read the image to get a copy of it so we can remove it - `Remove()` is a method on an `Image` struct, so we need to `NewFromLocal()` first to get a copy of said image. I am betting it's `NewFromLocal` that is failing.

Could be, this is one it would be a lot easier to diagnose if we had a reporter.  It looks like something got screwed up in the manifest, and we are blocking because of this, but should be able to just force remove it.
